_comment: reflect plugin hook manifest. PostToolUse (observation) — distinct from stetkeep's PreToolUse (prevention).

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Tier 3 utterance detection. UserPromptSubmit does not support matchers.

_notes.windows: On native Windows PowerShell (no Git Bash), replace command with: powershell -File ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/reflect-trigger.ps1
_notes.env: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is injected by Claude Code and points to the plugin's installed directory.
_notes.trigger_logic: Hook accumulates revert signals across recent tool calls. When threshold (sum >= 2.4 in last 10 calls) met, invokes bin/reflect.ts which calls Opus 4.7 and writes .reflect/session-guidance.md.
_notes.cost: Most calls return immediately (signal below threshold). Trigger costs ~$0.04 warm / ~$0.09 cold per reflection.
